enterprise_control_plane_track.legacy_gate_program: historically closed by proof in repository evidence
enterprise_control_plane_track.note: This does not imply universal-builder launch readiness.

generated_output_evidence.caveat: Generated-output launch claim is supported by runtime proof artifacts, greenfield emitted output evidence, and static representative domain launch-package contract compliance. This is not an exhaustive claim across every blueprint permutation, integration path, or deployment environment.

runnable_output_evidence.caveat: Runnable-output proof establishes local command-execution readiness for representative emitted domain trees; it does not assert exhaustive production deployment success across all infrastructures and integrations.

external_integration_deployment_evidence.caveat: External integration/deployment proof validates integration contracts, secret hygiene, per-domain external dependency matrix, and deployment instruction presence; it does not perform live calls to external services and is not a substitute for production smoke testing.

deployment_dry_run_evidence.caveat: Deployment dry-run proof validates deployment configuration presence, preview artifact generation, smoke-test plan generation, and rollback plan generation; it does not perform live deployment, use real credentials, or call external production APIs.

credentialed_deployment_readiness_eviden.caveat: Credentialed deployment readiness proof declares required credentials, approval-gate constraints, provider adapter interfaces, and secret handling policies; it does not validate real credentials or execute live deployment.

live_deployment_execution_readiness_evid.caveat: Live deployment execution readiness proof captures execution-layer contracts and guardrails but does not perform live deployment, use real secrets, or validate real credentials.

secrets_credential_management_readiness_.caveat: Secret references are metadata-only in this repository proof pass and use secret:// URIs and fingerprints only; live deployment remains blocked by default and still requires explicit approval plus user-supplied credentials.

autonomous_complex_build_readiness_evide.caveat: Autonomous complex build evidence is readiness proof for milestone-gated autonomous execution and escalation policy; it is not an exhaustive claim that every complex specification has been fully live-deployed.

chat_first_orchestration.cap_reason: operator routing and universal runtime proof harnesses are active across greenfield, dirty-repo, self-upgrade, and universal pipeline paths

spec_intelligence.cap_reason: spec engine and build contract are runtime-proven with domain-depth matrix coverage; continued category-specific depth can improve confidence

build_contract_governance.cap_reason: build contract and governance gates are runtime-exercised with validator-backed launch-truth alignment

generated_app_quality.cap_reason: strict benchmark and generated-app quality validators pass at threshold with zero critical failures

benchmark_coverage.cap_reason: 31 benchmark cases execute at strict pass thresholds with zero critical failures

documentation_truth.cap_reason: launch blockers, scorecard, manifest, and README are validator-enforced for universal launch-truth consistency
